channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Native American students miss school at higher rates. It only got worse during the pandemic
item.description: SAN CARLOS, Ariz. (AP) — After missing 40 days of school last year, Tommy Betom, 10, is on track this year for much better attendance. The importance of showing up has been stressed repeatedly at school — and at home.
item.dc:creator: CHEYANNE MUMPHREY, SHARON LURYE and MORGAN LEE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: The G20 has 'shock absorbers' to deal with Trump's return as US president, South Africa says
item.description: CAPE TOWN, South Africa (AP) — The Group of 20 has sufficient “shock absorbers” to function effectively if the incoming Donald Trump administration promotes an America First policy at the expense of international cooperation, South Africa's leader said Tuesday as his country took over the bloc's pre
item.dc:creator: GERALD IMRAY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Missouri man facing execution in the sexual assault and strangling of a 9-year-old girl
item.description: A Missouri man is facing scheduled execution Tuesday evening for the sexual assault and killing of a 9-year-old girl whose body was dumped in a sinkhole.
item.dc:creator: Jim Salter, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Florida woman sentenced to life for zipping boyfriend into suitcase, suffocating him
item.description: A Florida woman was sentenced Monday to life in prison for zipping her boyfriend into a suitcase and leaving him to die of suffocation amid a history of domestic and alcohol abuse.
item.dc:creator: CURT ANDERSON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Self-defense or too much force? That's the question for jurors as subway chokehold trial wraps
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A defense lawyer asked jurors to put themselves in frightened subway riders' shoes Monday at the trial of a Marine veteran charged with choking an irate, homeless man to death after an outburst on a New York underground train.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER PELTZ, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Hegseth forced out of vets groups due to drinking, misconduct: New Yorker
item.description: The incidents — relayed in a trail of documents and corroborated to The New Yorker by the accounts of former colleagues — took place prior to Hegseth becoming a full-time Fox News TV host in 2017.
item.dc:creator: Ellen Mitchell, NewsNation

item.title: Brown University transfers ownership of a portion of its land to Pokanoket Indian Tribe
item.description: Brown University has transferred ownership of a portion of its land in Bristol, Rhode Island, to a preservation trust established by the Pokanoket Indian Tribe.
item.dc:creator: STEVE LeBLANC, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: IRS warns holiday shoppers to be cautious of scams
item.description: The Internal Revenue Service and its Security Summit partners issued a warning Monday, urging taxpayers to exercise extra caution during holiday shopping to avoid falling victim to identity theft scams.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Hegseth forced out of vets groups due to drinking, misconduct: New Yorker
item.description: The incidents — relayed in a trail of documents and corroborated to The New Yorker by the accounts of former colleagues — took place prior to Hegseth becoming a full-time Fox News TV host in 2017.
item.dc:creator: Ellen Mitchell, Fox 5

item.title: Abnormal brain and childhood abuse make Missouri man unfit for execution, his lawyers say
item.description: ST. LOUIS (AP) — A Missouri man facing the death penalty for sexually assaulting and killing a child was a frequent victim of physical and sexual abuse in his youth and has a “structurally abnormal” brain that impairs his judgment, according to a clemency petition filed on his behalf.
item.dc:creator: JIM SALTER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: More than 100 unaccompanied kids found at US border: Texas official
item.description: According to Texas Department of Public Safety Lt. Chris Olivarez, the children they've encountered ranged from 2 years old to 17 years old.
item.dc:creator: Jorge Ventura, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Jamie Komoroski sentenced for Folly Beach DUI crash that killed new bride
item.description: CHARLESTON, S.C. (WCBD) – The woman accused of drunkenly crashing into a golf cart, killing a bride, and seriously injuring members of the wedding party on Folly Beach last year was sentenced during a Monday afternoon hearing in Charleston for charges related to the incident.
item.dc:creator: Jameson Moyer, Fox 5

item.title: Prosecutor says officers acted 'recklessly' in Black man's death during mental health crisis
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Two Indianapolis police officers charged in the death of a Black man — who was shocked with a Taser during a mental health crisis — acted “recklessly" by restraining him face down longer than necessary, a prosecutor said during opening statements Monday.
item.dc:creator: RICK CALLAHAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: White House unveils 'A Season of Peace and Light' Christmas decorations
item.description: First Lady Jill Biden has decked out the White House with some whimsical decorations to evoke the “peace and light” of the season.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Intel CEO steps down as chipmaker falters, lays off staff
item.description: Intel CEO Pat Gelsinger has stepped down after a three-year stint leading the company, the chipmaker announced Monday.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, Fox 5

item.title: Chicago suspect accused of shooting Jewish man near synagogue is dead after found hanging in his cell
item.description: A suspect charged in the shooting of an Orthodox Jewish man as he made his way to a Chicago Synagogue was found dead by suicide in his jail cell.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Supreme Court doesn't seem convinced FDA was unfair in blocking flavored vapes as teen use increased
item.description: A majority of Supreme Court justices didn’t seem convinced Monday that federal regulators misled companies before refusing to allow them to sell sweet flavored vaping products following a surge in teen e-cigarette use.
item.dc:creator: Lindsay Whitehurst, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: US Navy destroys Houthi missiles and drones targeting American ships in Gulf of Aden
item.description: U.S. Navy destroyers shot down seven missiles and drones fired by Yemen’s Houthi rebels at the warships and three American merchant vessels they were escorting through the Gulf of Aden. No damage or injuries were reported.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: New concrete formula could be key to fixing the roads: Michigan researchers
item.description: A team of researchers at Michigan State University claim this new type of concrete is “flexible, self-heating and self-healing.
item.dc:creator: Matt Jaworowski, ABC 4

item.title: Philadelphia defense, Tucker's misses help the Eagles to a 24-19 win in their showdown with Ravens
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Saquon Barkley vs. Derrick Henry was never supposed to be a head-to-head matchup. “It ain't basketball. It ain't like I go out there and tackle Derrick Henry,” Barkley said. “To be honest, I don't know if I really want to tackle Derrick Henry.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Big Ten fines Michigan and Ohio State $100,000 each for postgame melee
item.description: The Big Ten Conference announced it fined Michigan and Ohio State $100,000 each for violating the conference's sportsmanship policy for the on-field melee at the end of the Wolverines' win in Columbus on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Biden pardons his son Hunter despite previous pledges not to
item.description: President Joe Biden has pardoned his son, Hunter, sparing the younger Biden a possible prison sentence for federal felony gun and tax convictions and reversing his past promises not to use the extraordinary powers of the presidency for the benefit of his family members.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Girl Scout saves dad days after learning CPR with her troop
item.description: Just days before Vada Carawan's father suffered a heart attack, the 11-year-old and her Girl Scout troop had learned CPR.
item.dc:creator: Deja Parker, ABC 4

item.title: Photos: New Starbucks gives customers view of a quiet North Korean village
item.description: Customers have to pass a military checkpoint before entering the observatory where the new Starbucks has opened.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: DACA recipients worry their protection from deportation won't last another Trump term
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — Reyna Montoya was 10 when she and her family fled violence in Tijuana and illegally immigrated to the U.S. Growing up in Arizona, she worried even a minor traffic violation could lead to her deportation.
item.dc:creator: GABRIEL SANDOVAL, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: What the cost-of-living adjustment increase in Social Security means
item.description: A 2.5% cost-of-living adjustment increase will mean an extra $50 a month for most Social Security and SSI recipients.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, WGN 9

item.title: Trump nominates Kash Patel to lead FBI
item.description: President-elect Trump plans to nominate Kash Patel to serve as head of the FBI, elevating a staunch ally and controversial figure who sparked internal battles during the first Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Southwest Airlines to end cabin service earlier on flights: Here's why
item.description: You'll be asked to fasten your seatbelts and return your seat to the upright position earlier than before.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: What to know about Kash Patel, Trump’s pick to lead the FBI
item.description: Kash Patel has called for radical changes at the FBI and was a fierce and vocal critic of the bureau’s work as it investigated ties between Russia and Donald Trump’s 2016 presidential campaign.
item.dc:creator: ERIC TUCKER and ALAN SUDERMAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump taps Kash Patel for FBI director, an ally who would aid in his effort to upend law enforcement
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump says he will nominate Kash Patel to serve as FBI director, turning to a fierce ally to upend America’s premier law enforcement agency and rid the government of perceived “conspirators.
item.dc:creator: ERIC TUCKER and ALAN SUDERMAN, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bob Bryar, former My Chemical Romance drummer, dies at 44
item.description: Bob Bryar, the drummer of the rock band My Chemical Romance from 2004 to 2014 has died, TMZ reports. He was 44. According to TMZ, Bryar was found dead in his Tennessee home Tuesday after last being seen alive on November 4.
item.dc:creator: Michaela Ratliff, KTLA 5

item.title: Ohio State, Michigan players involved in melee after Buckeyes loss, multiple people pepper sprayed
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (WCMH) — Michigan players planted their team flag at midfield of Ohio Stadium on Saturday afternoon after a 13-10 win over No. 2 Ohio State, leading to a brawl between players from both teams with police attempting to separate the sides and pepper spray being used.
item.dc:creator: Orri Benatar, KRON4

item.title: Lake-effect snow heading for New York state could disrupt travel and football
item.description: BUFFALO, N.Y. (AP) — Black Friday was giving way to a white weekend in parts of New York state, with the first big snow of the season threatening to bury towns along lakes Erie and Ontario during a hectic holiday travel and shopping weekend.
item.dc:creator: CAROLYN THOMPSON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: The ‘Most Wished For’ Amazon items on sale for Cyber Monday
item.description: These are the most-wanted Amazon items among shoppers — at least, the ones that have great deals going on for Cyber Monday.
item.dc:creator: Christina Marfice, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Head of Ohio's teacher pension fund retires Sunday, saying fund is strong despite staff vacancies
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (AP) — The outgoing head of Ohio's troubled teachers retirement system said that she is leaving the fund in strong fiscal condition, despite the turmoil at the top that her successor will inherit.
item.dc:creator: JULIE CARR SMYTH, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Cucumbers sold in 26 states recalled over Salmonella concerns
item.description: A produce company based in Arizona is recalling whole cucumbers that were distributed in more than two dozen states and Canada due to Salmonella concerns.
item.dc:creator: Kyler Swaim, Fox 5

item.title: Hot showers can harm skin, hair health, dermatologists say
item.description: Scalding showers can lead to the removal of skin layers and essential oils from your body, which can be damaging.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Soriano, ABC 4
